items.definition_en: A broom is a tool used for sweeping floors.
items.example_en: I use a broom to clean the kitchen floor.

items.definition_en: A mop is a tool used to wash floors.
items.example_en: She wiped the floor with a mop.

items.definition_en: A vacuum cleaner is a machine that cleans floors by sucking up dirt.
items.example_en: We bought a new vacuum cleaner yesterday.

items.definition_en: A bucket is a container used for holding water.
items.example_en: Please fill the bucket with warm water.

items.definition_en: A cloth is a piece of material used for cleaning.
items.example_en: He wiped the table with a clean cloth.

items.definition_en: A dustpan is a flat container used for collecting dust and dirt.
items.example_en: Take the dustpan and sweep up the crumbs.

items.definition_en: A sponge is a soft material used to absorb water and clean surfaces.
items.example_en: I cleaned the dishes with a yellow sponge.

items.definition_en: Detergent is a liquid or powder used for cleaning.
items.example_en: We need more detergent for the laundry.

items.definition_en: A brush is an object with bristles used for scrubbing and cleaning.
items.example_en: She cleaned her shoes with a small brush.

items.definition_en: Soap is a substance used with water for washing.
items.example_en: I washed my hands with soap.

items.definition_en: A glove is something you wear on your hand to protect it.
items.example_en: He wore a glove while washing the dishes.

items.definition_en: A towel is a piece of cloth used to dry things.
items.example_en: She used a towel to dry the plates.

items.definition_en: A trash bag is a plastic bag used to hold garbage.
items.example_en: Put the trash in a trash bag.

items.definition_en: A bin is a container for waste.
items.example_en: Empty the bin when it is full.

items.definition_en: A laundry basket is a container for dirty clothes.
items.example_en: The laundry basket was full of clothes.

items.definition_en: A washing machine is a machine for cleaning clothes.
items.example_en: I put the dirty clothes in the washing machine.

items.definition_en: A dryer is a machine for drying clothes.
items.example_en: I put the wet clothes in the dryer.
